name: transfer_like
description: TransferLike with to == DEST_ADDR and value >= TRANSFER_VALUE
eventSig: event TransferLike(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

name: static_args
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)

name: dynamic_args
eventSig: event DynamicArgs(string note, bytes blob, uint256[] nums)

name: transfer_from_to_eq
description: TransferLike with from == FROM_ADDR and to == DEST_ADDR
eventSig: event TransferLike(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

name: transfer_value_eq
eventSig: event TransferLike(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

name: transfer_value_gt
eventSig: event TransferLike(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value)

name: indexed_dynamic
eventSig: event IndexedDynamic(string indexed note, bytes indexed blob)

name: indexed_dynamic_note_eq
eventSig: event IndexedDynamic(string indexed note, bytes indexed blob)

name: indexed_dynamic_blob_eq
eventSig: event IndexedDynamic(string indexed note, bytes indexed blob)

name: indexed_dynamic_note_blob_eq
description: IndexedDynamic with both note and blob predicates
eventSig: event IndexedDynamic(string indexed note, bytes indexed blob)

name: static_amount_eq
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)

name: static_custom_all_fields_eq
description: StaticArgs custom emit, all fields exact match

name: static_user_eq
description: StaticArgs sample with user address predicate (non-indexed address)
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)

name: static_sig_eq
description: StaticArgs sample with bytes4 signature predicate (non-indexed bytes4)
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)
knownIssue: Currently fails due to issue with bytes4 / issue with unindexed offsets

name: static_tag_eq
description: StaticArgs sample with bytes32 tag predicate (padding-sensitive)
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)
knownIssue: Currently fails due to issue with unindexed offsets

name: static_custom_order_permuted
description: StaticArgs custom emit with same predicates but permuted order (offset/order diagnostic)
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)
knownIssue: Currently fails due to issue with unindexed offsets

name: static_sig_wrong_len_compile_fail
description: Compile should fail: bytes4 predicate provided with 3 bytes
eventSig: event StaticArgs(address user, bool ok, bytes4 sig, bytes32 tag, uint256 amount)
